---
title: Schedule of the DMD 2026
format:
    html: default
    pdf: default
---

**Rooms**: F1 and F2, both located at the physics building of the [Faculty of Science](https://fciencias.ugr.es/)

### 28 June

20:00 Reception. [Carmen de la Victoria](https://carmendelavictoria.ugr.es/)

### 29 June
+---------------+---------------------+---------------------+
|               | Room F1             | Room F2             |
+---------------+---------------------+---------------------+
| 08:15 - 08:45 | Registration: hall Faculty of Science     |
+---------------+-------------------------------------------+
| 08:45 - 09:00 | Opening                                   |
+---------------+-------------------------------------------+
| 09:15 - 10:15 | First Plenary Talk                        |
+---------------+-------------------------------------------+
| 10:15 - 10:45 | Coffee break                              |
+---------------+---------------------+---------------------+
| 10:45 - 11:45 | Three talks         | Three talks         |
+---------------+---------------------+---------------------+
| 11:45 - 12:00 | Short break                               |
+---------------+---------------------+---------------------+
| 12:00 - 13:00 | Three talks         | Three talks         |
+---------------+---------------------+---------------------+
| 13:00 - 15:00 | Lunch                                     |
+---------------+---------------------+---------------------+
| 15:00 - 16:00 | Second plenary talk                       |
+---------------+---------------------+---------------------+
| 16:00 - 16:30 | Coffee break                              |
+---------------+---------------------+---------------------+
| 16:30 - 17:10 | Two talks           | Two talks           |
+---------------+---------------------+---------------------+
| 17:10 - 18:00 | Poster session                            |
+---------------+---------------------+---------------------+
| 18:00 - 18:30 | Business meeting                          |
+---------------+---------------------+---------------------+

### 30 June
+---------------+---------------------+---------------------+
|               | Room F1             | Room F2             |
+---------------+---------------------+---------------------+
| 09:15 - 10:15 | Third Plenary Talk                        |
+---------------+-------------------------------------------+
| 10:15 - 10:45 | Coffee break                              |
+---------------+---------------------+---------------------+
| 10:45 - 11:45 | Three talks         | Three talks         |
+---------------+---------------------+---------------------+
| 11:45 - 12:00 | Short break                               |
+---------------+---------------------+---------------------+
| 12:00 - 13:00 | Three talks         | Three talks         |
+---------------+---------------------+---------------------+
| 13:00 - 13:10 | Group photo                               |
+---------------+---------------------+---------------------+
| 13:10 - 15:00 | Lunch                                     |
+---------------+---------------------+---------------------+
| 15:00 - 16:00 | Lull prize talk                           |
+---------------+---------------------+---------------------+
| 16:00 - 16:30 | Coffee break                              |
+---------------+---------------------+---------------------+
| 16:30 - 17:10 | Two talks           | Two talks           |
+---------------+---------------------+---------------------+
| 18:30 - 19:30 | Math walk                                 |
+---------------+---------------------+---------------------+
| 20:30 - 22:30 | Gala dinner                               |
+---------------+---------------------+---------------------+


### 1 July

+---------------+---------------------+---------------------+
|               | Room F1             | Room F2             |
+---------------+---------------------+---------------------+
| 09:30 - 10:30 | Fourth Plenary Talk                       |
+---------------+-------------------------------------------+
| 10:30 - 11:00 | Coffee break                              |
+---------------+---------------------+---------------------+
| 11:00 - 12:00 | Three talks         | Three talks         |
+---------------+---------------------+---------------------+
| 11:00 - 12:20 | Short break                               |
+---------------+---------------------+---------------------+
| 12:20 - 13:00 | Two talks           | Two talks           |
+---------------+---------------------+---------------------+
| 13:00 - 13:10 | Farewell                                  |
+---------------+---------------------+---------------------+
